about_quotes.speaker: Big Nick Nicholas
about_quotes.evidence: Kelly was the leader and we had chorus girls... I think I was in Kelly Martin's Band... Kelly Martin found out I was in town and then he hired me

about_quotes.speaker: Erskine Hawkins
about_quotes.evidence: Kelly Martin was with me also with the big band, too, for awhile also before he went with the 'Misty' man.

about_quotes.speaker: Bobby Johnson Jr.
about_quotes.evidence: the southern was maybe Kelly Martin, our drummer, that was with Erroll Garner later on in life. But I stayed with him a long time... I knew them from the south.
about_quotes.doc_title: Bobby Johnson Jr. interviewed by Monk Rowe, Ellenville, New York, June 23, 1998

about_quotes.speaker: Patricia Willard
about_quotes.evidence: He really had started out the club with Kelly Martin... But by the time I got there Howard was gone, but we knew about each other.
